crime.value: Two middle-aged women murdered in Blood Brook, weapon unknown, possibly connected to historical murder of Holocaust survivor
crime.quote: investigate and solve the murders of two, middle age women in a place called, Blood Brook

victim.value: Two middle-aged women (Greta Shoemaker, Dorothy Timberlake), connection to victims unclear from excerpt
victim.quote: Chapter One.....Greta Shoemaker Chapter Two.....Dorothy Timberlake

closed_world.value: Blood Brook area, geographically bounded location with historical significance
closed_world.quote: murders of two, middle age women in a place called, Blood Brook

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown perpetrator, possibly connected to victims personally rather than serial killer, motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: I don't think this guy is a serial killer. Instead, I believe he's finished killing

investigator.value: Police Captain Robert Wallace, assigned to County Prosecutor's Office for homicide investigation
investigator.quote: Police Captain Robert Wallace requests sixty vacation days

red_herring.value: Serial killer theory deliberately constructed but then dismissed - investigators conclude killer is finished and has personal connection to victims
red_herring.quote: I don't think this guy is a serial killer. Instead, I believe he's finished killing

clue_fairness.value: Historical research about Emanuel Weiss, Jewish refugee murdered with pitchfork at Blood Brook, shared with reader as Wallace receives it
clue_fairness.quote: I found a small article about a chicken farmer named Emanuel Weiss who was stabbed to death with a pitchfork

social_world.value: Police hierarchy with Captain Wallace reporting to County Prosecutor's Office, showing institutional power structures controlling investigation
social_world.quote: His request is denied when he is assigned to the County Prosecutor's Office to investigate

reveal_mechanic.value: Unknown murder weapon central to solution - investigators repeatedly mention inability to identify the weapon used
reveal_mechanic.quote: Like you, I can't figure out what the heck the murder weapon can be

investigator_wound.value: Wallace's inexperience with violence and homicide investigation, creating psychological vulnerability to the brutal nature of the crimes
investigator_wound.quote: As you know this is my first homicide investigation. I'm not use to blood, dead bodies and violence

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton blood brook
